name: Media Pipeline & GUI Polish
objectives: Image processing pipeline with free models (cf/bria/rmbg for backgrounds)
Platform-specific image sizing (eBay, Shopify, Etsy standards)
React dashboard UI for listing creation and management
Real-time upload progress tracking via WebSocket
CSV batch preview and validation UI

files_to_create.description: Image processing pipeline - resize, optimize, format conversion
Main dashboard with listing stats, recent uploads, quick actions
Multi-step listing creation form with AI enrichment preview
Drag-drop image upload with progress and preview
WebSocket hook for real-time listing enrichment updates

platforms_needing_ui: eBay (CSV batch, condition mapping, category suggestions)
free_api_candidates: Llama 3.3 for content generation (already in use)
Image APIs: libvips via wasm or sharp (self-hosted)
next_phase: Phase 5 — Social Content Generation: TikTok scripts, Pinterest pins, Instagram captions
